values.name: FAILURE
values.description: An annotation indicating an inescapable error.

values.name: NOTICE
values.description: An annotation indicating some information.

values.name: WARNING
values.description: An annotation indicating an ignorable error.

enums.name: CheckConclusionState
enums.description: The possible states for a check suite or run conclusion.

values.name: ACTION_REQUIRED
values.description: The check suite or run requires action.

values.name: CANCELLED
values.description: The check suite or run has been cancelled.

values.name: FAILURE
values.description: The check suite or run has failed.

values.name: NEUTRAL
values.description: The check suite or run was neutral.

values.name: SKIPPED
values.description: The check suite or run was skipped.

values.name: STALE
values.description: The check suite or run was marked stale by GitHub. Only GitHub can use this conclusion.

values.name: STARTUP_FAILURE
values.description: The check suite or run has failed at startup.

values.name: SUCCESS
values.description: The check suite or run has succeeded.

values.name: TIMED_OUT
values.description: The check suite or run has timed out.

enums.name: CheckRunState
enums.description: The possible states of a check run in a status rollup.

values.name: ACTION_REQUIRED
values.description: The check run requires action.

values.name: CANCELLED
values.description: The check run has been cancelled.

values.name: COMPLETED
values.description: The check run has been completed.

values.name: FAILURE
values.description: The check run has failed.

values.name: IN_PROGRESS
values.description: The check run is in progress.

values.name: NEUTRAL
values.description: The check run was neutral.

values.name: PENDING
values.description: The check run is in pending state.

values.name: QUEUED
values.description: The check run has been queued.

values.name: SKIPPED
values.description: The check run was skipped.

values.name: STALE
values.description: The check run was marked stale by GitHub. Only GitHub can use this conclusion.

values.name: STARTUP_FAILURE
values.description: The check run has failed at startup.

values.name: SUCCESS
values.description: The check run has succeeded.

values.name: TIMED_OUT
values.description: The check run has timed out.

values.name: WAITING
values.description: The check run is in waiting state.

values.name: ALL
values.description: Every check run available.

values.name: LATEST
values.description: The latest check run.

enums.name: CheckStatusState
enums.description: The possible states for a check suite or run status.

values.name: COMPLETED
values.description: The check suite or run has been completed.

values.name: IN_PROGRESS
values.description: The check suite or run is in progress.

values.name: PENDING
values.description: The check suite or run is in pending state.

values.name: QUEUED
values.description: The check suite or run has been queued.

values.name: REQUESTED
values.description: The check suite or run has been requested.

values.name: WAITING
values.description: The check suite or run is in waiting state.
